\end{table*}

    \bottomrule
  \end{tabular}%
  }
  \vspace{2pt}
  \begin{minipage}{0.98\linewidth}
  \footnotesize All baselines used the same train/validation/test split, validation max-F1 threshold, held-out test set, and bootstrap confidence-interval protocol.
  \end{minipage}
\end{table*}
